products.name: Nyssa
products.blurb: Clean-lined Canadian cedar cabin with panoramic glazing — designed to read as architecture, not equipment.

products.name: Nua
products.blurb: Generous glazing and a warm cedar interior — a sauna built to anchor a backyard sanctuary.

products.name: Marrkan
products.blurb: Full-height Canadian cedar cabin with ultra-low-EMF carbon heaters and a deep, restorative footprint.

products.name: Yirri
products.blurb: Deliberate cold exposure in a hand-finished cedar plunge — the other half of the thermal cycle.
